offer: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inefficient scheduling causes project delays. We provide a system that schedules and tracks daily equipment inspections instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inefficient scheduling and tracking of daily equipment inspections leading to potential project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project management
Indie Hackers discussions on workflow improvements
Direct messages to contractors with demo video
Community forums for construction tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual entry for inspection data and daily reminder notifications for inspections on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
